name: Sensitive File Uploaded to a Publicly Accessible Folder
notes: This rule triggers when a sensitive file is uploaded to a publicly accessible folder or bucket.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Upload Events
when an event matches any of the following BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
when any of File Directory (custom), Storage Name (custom) are contained in any of Publicly Accessible Folders - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Sensitive File Uploaded to a Publicly Accessible Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Upload Events
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
AND when any of File Directory (custom), Storage Name (custom) are contained in any of Publicly Accessible Folders - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Sensitive File Uploaded to a Publicly Accessible Folder
Event description: Sensitive file uploaded to a publicly accessible folder or bucket
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
